title: sorghum nitidum
intro: Sorghum nitidum, also known as black sorghum, is a plant species belonging to the sorghum genus, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a remedy for snake bites. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots in water to create a medicinal liquid.
